text.message: I hope you understand I only soloed you because you soloed me and robbed me twice oj
Well you still ain’t gonna win blue
You saw me pointing there and then pointed there yourself oj. Hope you don’t king make because you lose a race you initiated
But because the 9s are popping off
U chose me who doesn’t even produce natural ore
You have a great 2 ports man
Still means I need double the production to produce the same amount of ore
Ports are just flexibility, not production
These rolls are so insane and unfair
And this 8 has been blocked all game
If you can move the robber shame on you black
And he hits the 11 for all those devs
